calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Default Prov-Up Hearing After Default
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ryan W. Stahl, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Richard Fiore and Janice Fiore, dba Fiore & Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Emlyne Aldana, individually; Emlyne Aldaba dba Clothespin Cleaners; E & M Business Ventures, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.
Plaintiff Janice Fiore Sworn and examinded.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $37,000.00
Holdover damages: $21,370.00
Attorney's Fees: $14,926.00
Costs: $1,718.29
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,010.29
Total Judgment in the amount of $76,024.58
The lease for 244 Townsend Street, San Francisco, CA 94107 is canceled and forfeited, Plaintiff gained possession of the premises on November 14, 2012, through Sheriff's eviction.
Judgment signed in open court.
